title: Kody Engine Lite Configuration
description: Configuration for the Kody autonomous SDLC pipeline. See https://github.com/aharonyaircohen/Kody-Engine-Lite

quality.description: Quality gate commands run during the verify stage. Leave empty string to skip.

typecheck.description: TypeScript type checking command (e.g., 'pnpm typecheck', 'pnpm tsc --noEmit')

lint.description: Lint command (e.g., 'pnpm lint'). Empty to skip.

lintFix.description: Auto-fix lint command, run when verify fails (e.g., 'pnpm lint:fix')

format.description: Format check command (e.g., 'pnpm format:check'). Empty to skip.

formatFix.description: Auto-fix format command, run when verify fails (e.g., 'pnpm format')

testUnit.description: Unit test command. Use test:unit to exclude integration/e2e tests (e.g., 'pnpm test:unit')

defaultBranch.description: Default branch for PR base and branch syncing (e.g., 'main', 'dev')

userEmail.description: Git user email for CI commits (optional, defaults to github-actions bot)

userName.description: Git user name for CI commits (optional, defaults to github-actions bot)

github.description: GitHub repository settings. Auto-detected from git remote by init.

taskDir.description: Directory for pipeline artifacts and state (committed to branch)

defaultRunner.description: Name of the default runner to use

modelMap.description: Maps model tiers to actual model names. Use LiteLLM aliases when litellmUrl is set.

cheap.description: Fast/cheap model for taskify stage (e.g., 'haiku' or LiteLLM alias)

mid.description: Mid-tier model for build, review-fix, autofix (e.g., 'sonnet' or LiteLLM alias)

strong.description: Strongest model for plan, review — deep reasoning (e.g., 'opus' or LiteLLM alias)

provider.description: LLM provider name. When set (and not 'anthropic'), engine auto-starts LiteLLM proxy and routes model calls to this provider. modelMap values should be the provider's model names.

litellmUrl.description: (Deprecated) Use 'provider' instead. LiteLLM proxy URL for manual setup.

usePerStageRouting.description: When true, uses stage name as the LiteLLM model alias instead of modelMap tier

stageRunners.description: Per-stage runner assignment (advanced). Maps stage name to runner name.
